dashboard.log:
Phase 3: UI primitives + gauge rings cho System card.

- js/modules/ui_components.js mới — port từ VWRT/charts.jsx + screens.jsx:
  • UI.pill(text, tone) — badge với status dot (ok/info/warn/bad).
  • UI.gauge(value, opts) — SVG circular progress (CPU/RAM/ROM).
  • UI.signalBars(0..5, opts) — 5-bar cellular indicator.
  • UI.sparkline(data, opts) — tiny line chart.
  • UI.areaChart(data, opts) — full area chart with grid + Y labels.
  • UI.statCard / UI.mini — composable card primitives.
  • UI.rsrpToBars(dBm) — helper map signal strength.

- system_info.js: render() giờ ưu tiên gauge SVG (sys-gauge-cpu/ram/rom), fallback progress bars cũ (kept hidden trong HTML).
- dashboard.html: thêm gauge row trong System card, progress bars cũ chuyển display:none, footer detail row hiện RAM/ROM dạng text.
- design-bridge.css: thêm style cho .stat-card .mini .dot.live, animation pulse cho live indicator.
- Mọi ID cũ giữ nguyên — không break module nào.
